creator: dohzono@gmail.com
text:
x11-toolkits/vte requests BSD.gnome.dist which I don't have
(I just want an mlterm without gnome).

How-To-Repeat: abacus3# make install
===>  Installing for vte-0.26.2
===>   vte-0.26.2 depends on file: /usr/local/etc/mtree/BSD.gnome.dist - not fo\
und
===>    Verifying reinstall for /usr/local/etc/mtree/BSD.gnome.dist in /usr/por\
ts/misc/gnomehier
     => No directory for /usr/local/etc/mtree/BSD.gnome.dist.  Skipping..
===>   vte-0.26.2 depends on executable: pkg-config - found
===>   vte-0.26.2 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/gio/modules/libgiofam.so - fo\
und
===>   vte-0.26.2 depends on shared library: intl - found
===>   vte-0.26.2 depends on shared library: atk-1.0.0 - found
===>   vte-0.26.2 depends on shared library: glib-2.0.0 - found
===>   vte-0.26.2 depends on shared library: gtk-x11-2.0.0 - found
===>   vte-0.26.2 depends on shared library: pango-1.0.0 - found
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if x11-toolkits/vte already installed
mtree: /usr/local/etc/mtree/BSD.gnome.dist: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/vte.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/vte.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/vte.
abacus3#
